summary: The diff primarily modifies ConversationView.tsx to add timestamp formatting and reply functionality. REQ-1 and REQ-2 appear largely implemented in the frontend. REQ-3 requires backend confirmation, but only frontend files are modified. Some REQ-2 acceptance criteria details need closer examination due to truncation.

missing_requirements.requirement: The Message type in the backend includes a timestamp field (Int or Time); the timestamp is returned in conversation query results.
missing_requirements.reason: No backend files were modified in the diff. The diff only touches frontend/src/components/ConversationView.tsx and metadata files. There is no evidence that a backend timestamp field was added or confirmed to exist. The formatTime function consumes a bigint timestamp field from Message, but no backend schema change is shown.

missing_requirements.requirement: A visual indicator (e.g., a reply-to banner above the input) shows which message is being replied to, with an option to cancel the reply.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff defines a ReplyContext interface and imports X (cancel icon) and Reply icons, and there is a handleReply callback, but the file is truncated before showing the input area UI. It is unclear whether the reply-to banner with cancel option is fully rendered above the input field.

hallucinated_features.description: Timestamp formatting for messages older than 7 days shows month/day instead of weekday.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only specifies 'Mon 2:45 PM' format for older messages (weekday + time). The implementation adds a third branch for messages older than 7 days showing 'MMM D HH:MM' format, which was not requested.
